name: Hearty Portuguese Kale Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Smoked sausage, sliced about 1/2 inch thick
1 large bunch (about 1 pound) kale, shredded or sliced very thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet; sauté the sausage just until the fat is rendered, about 3 to 5 minutes. Drain on paper towels and reserve.
2. Bring broth to a boil with the onions and potatoes; simmer 10 to 15 minutes until potatoes are very tender.
3. Mash onions and potatoes in the broth with a potato masher or slotted spoon.
4. Add drained sausage slices and kale. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 3 to 5 minutes, until kale is tender.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed with salt and pepper. Serve hot.
Shepherd writes: "For a cold night, serve with a warm crusty bread and good beer or red wine for a complete meal."
